sections.paragraph:
ϰοίτη, ης, ἡ [κεῖμαι]

—1. ‘a device ordinarily used for sleeping’, bed

—a. simply as accommodation for sleeping bed Lk 11:7.

—b. w. focus on place for sexual activity of married pers. marriage bed Hb 13:4.

—2. of sexual intercourse, metonymic euphemism in ext. of 1

—a. conception in a marital relationship Ro 9:10.

—b. pl. casual sexual activities 13:13.
